caption: The video appears to be part of a medical simulation exercise, likely focused on decision-making during patient care. The screen displays various vital signs and monitoring parameters, including an ECG that indicates the leads are off, a SpO2 reading of 97%, and a pulse rate of 110. There is also a note that there is no CO2 sensor connected. The interface suggests that this is a simulated environment where trainees can practice responding to different scenarios. The text "Day 2" and "Medical Decision Making" along with "Sim Week" implies that this is part of a structured training program, possibly for medical students or healthcare professionals. The setting seems to be a controlled environment designed to mimic real-life clinical situations.
